# gcore_storage_object_storage_bucket (Resource)

Buckets are containers within object storage that hold files (objects) and define their CORS, lifecycle, and access policy configuration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "gcore_storage_object_storage_bucket" "example_storage_object_storage_bucket" {
  storage_id = 0
  name = "my-new-bucket"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the bucket to create
- `storage_id` (Number)

### Optional

- `cors` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--cors))
- `policy` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--policy))
- `storage_object_storage_bucket_lifecycle` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--storage_object_storage_bucket_lifecycle))

<a id="nestedatt--cors"></a>
### Nested Schema for `cors`

Optional:

- `allowed_origins` (List of String) Web domains allowed to make direct browser requests. Send an empty array to remove CORS configuration.


<a id="nestedatt--policy"></a>
### Nested Schema for `policy`

Optional:

- `is_public` (Boolean) Set to true to allow unauthenticated object downloads, false to require valid S3 credentials.


<a id="nestedatt--storage_object_storage_bucket_lifecycle"></a>
### Nested Schema for `storage_object_storage_bucket_lifecycle`

Optional:

- `expiration_days` (Number) Days before objects are automatically deleted. Set to a positive number to enable, or null/0 to remove the rule.
